name: How to change "Preferred Network Mode" using adb without reboot?
snippet: I'm trying to change my phone's (CM 12, Stock 4.2, both rooted) preferred network mode from "GSM/WCDMA" (0) to "WCDMA only" (2) and vice versa. name: Android Debug Bridge (adb) | Android Studio
snippet: Android Debug Bridge (adb) is a versatile command-line tool that lets you communicate with a device. The adb command facilitates a variety of device actions.

name: Android privacy: In search of possibilities using adb #359 - GitHub
snippet: By setting the preferred network mode to a value that excludes 2G (GSM) networks, you effectively disable 2G communications. GSM = 2G; WCDMA , CDMA , EvDo = 3G ...

name: How to execute ADB commands on Android devices remotely? - Hexnode

name: How to set the Android network interface using shell commands
snippet: In this post, I'd like to tell you how to set the Android network preferences on Android devices, that is, IP Address, Netmask, Gateway and DNS.
